functions.name: addDatabase
functions.description: Adds a SurrealDB database resource to the application model

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the resource. This name will be used as the connection string name when referenced in a dependency.

parameters.name: databaseName
parameters.description: The name of the database. If not provided, this defaults to the same value as `name`.

functions.name: addNamespace
functions.description: Adds a SurrealDB namespace resource to the application model

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the resource. This name will be used as the connection string name when referenced in a dependency.

parameters.name: namespaceName
parameters.description: The name of the namespace. If not provided, this defaults to the same value as `name`.

functions.name: addSurrealServer
functions.description: Adds a SurrealDB resource to the application model. A container is used for local development. The default image is and the tag is .
functions.signature: addSurrealServer(name: string, userName?: ParameterResource, password?: ParameterResource, port?: number, path?: string, strictMode?: boolean): SurrealDbServerResource

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the resource. This name will be used as the connection string name when referenced in a dependency.

parameters.name: userName
parameters.description: The parameter used to provide the administrator username for the SurrealDB resource.

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: The parameter used to provide the administrator password for the SurrealDB resource. If `null` a random password will be generated.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: The host port for the SurrealDB instance.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Sets the path for storing data. If no argument is given, the default of `memory` for non-persistent storage in memory is assumed.

parameters.name: strictMode
parameters.description: Whether strict mode is enabled on the server.

functions.name: connectionStringExpression
functions.description: Gets the connection string expression for the SurrealDB database.

functions.name: databaseName
functions.description: Gets the database name.

functions.name: parent
functions.description: Gets the parent SurrealDB namespace resource.

functions.name: connectionStringExpression
functions.description: Gets the connection string expression for the SurrealDB database.

functions.name: databases
functions.description: A dictionary where the key is the resource name and the value is the database name.

functions.name: namespaceName
functions.description: Gets the namespace name.

functions.name: parent
functions.description: Gets the parent SurrealDB container resource.

functions.name: connectionStringExpression
functions.description: Gets the connection string expression for the SurrealDB instance.

functions.name: host
functions.description: Gets the host endpoint reference for this resource.

functions.name: namespaces
functions.description: A dictionary where the key is the resource name and the value is the namespace name.

functions.name: passwordParameter
functions.description: Gets the parameter that contains the SurrealDB password.

functions.name: port
functions.description: Gets the port endpoint reference for this resource.

functions.name: primaryEndpoint
functions.description: Gets the primary endpoint for the SurrealDB instance.

functions.name: uriExpression
functions.description: Gets the connection URI expression for the SurrealDB instance.

functions.name: userNameParameter
functions.description: Gets the parameter that contains the SurrealDB username.

functions.name: withCreationScript
functions.description: Defines the SQL script used to create the namespace.
functions.remarks:
Default script is
```
DEFINE NAMESPACE IF NOT EXISTS `QUOTED_NAMESPACE_NAME`;
```

parameters.name: script
parameters.description: The SQL script used to create the namespace.

functions.name: withCreationScript
functions.description: Defines the SQL script used to create the database.
functions.remarks:
Default script is
```
DEFINE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS `QUOTED_DATABASE_NAME`;
```

parameters.name: script
parameters.description: The SQL script used to create the database.

functions.name: withDataBindMount
functions.description: Adds a bind mount for the data folder to a SurrealDB resource.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: The source directory on the host to mount into the container.

functions.name: withDataVolume
functions.description: Adds a named volume for the data folder to a SurrealDB resource.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the volume. Defaults to an auto-generated name based on the application and resource names.

functions.name: withInitFiles
functions.description: Copies init files into a SurrealDB container resource.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: The source file on the host to copy into the container.

functions.name: withSurrealDbOtlpExporter
functions.description: Injects the appropriate environment variables to allow the resource to enable sending telemetry to the dashboard. 1. It sets the OTLP endpoint to the value of the DOTNET_DASHBOARD_OTLP_ENDPOINT_URL environment variable. 2. It sets the service name and instance id to the resource name and UID. Values are injected by the orchestrator. 3. It sets a small batch schedule delay in development. This reduces the delay that OTLP exporter waits to sends telemetry and makes the dashboard telemetry pages responsive.

handleTypes.name: SurrealDbDatabaseResource

capabilities.description: Defines the SQL script used to create the database.
capabilities.remarks:
Default script is
```
DEFINE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS `QUOTED_DATABASE_NAME`;
```

parameters.name: script
parameters.description: The SQL script used to create the database.

capabilities.name: withSurrealDbOtlpExporter
capabilities.description: Injects the appropriate environment variables to allow the resource to enable sending telemetry to the dashboard. 1. It sets the OTLP endpoint to the value of the DOTNET_DASHBOARD_OTLP_ENDPOINT_URL environment variable. 2. It sets the service name and instance id to the resource name and UID. Values are injected by the orchestrator. 3. It sets a small batch schedule delay in development. This reduces the delay that OTLP exporter waits to sends telemetry and makes the dashboard telemetry pages responsive.
